advice: This is classic 'office housework'. It takes time but rarely leads to promotion.
script: I'd love to help, but I'm currently fully dedicated to [Project Name] and can't give this the attention it deserves. Perhaps we can rotate this responsibility?

advice: Consistently taking notes can position you as 'support' rather than 'leader'. Rotate this.
script: I've taken notes the last few times. Shall we assign someone else or use an AI tool today so I can focus on the discussion?

advice: Valuable, but ensure it doesn't crowd out your core KPIs. Document this as 'Leadership' in reviews.
script: I can definitely spend 30 mins with them, but for deeper onboarding, I'll need to defer to the training manager.

advice: High impact! This gives visibility with senior leadership. Prioritize this.
script: I'm excited to lead this. I'll have the draft deck ready by Tuesday.

advice: Strong technical contribution. Ensure you demo the fix to the team.
script: I'm on it. This aligns well with our stability goals.

advice: Zero career value. Delegate or use a service.
script: I'm in the middle of a sprint. Can we use the office admin or a delivery app for this?

advice: Excellent core work. Document the performance gains.
script: Training started. I'll share the accuracy metrics in the morning standup.
